title: Wood Shield Designs
body:
The banner designs on the shield have been changed to have the wooden design, and I changed some patterns to give them a metallic look. The patterns are:

   - Circle
   - Creeper
   - Cross
   - Flower
   - Glove
   - Mojang
   - Piglin
   - Rhombus
   - Skull
   - Flow
   - Guster 
  

 NOT Requires Optifine
